title.en: So, Ye Tian rushed to the Battle Ancestor Realm...

content.en:
As the news spread that the third Dark Sanctuary was about to be born, the entire Dark Sanctuary was boiling.

The third Dark Holy Land, this is a brand new Holy Land comparable to the Dark Holy Land, the key is the countless resources, which is definitely something that countless cultivators dream of.

Moreover, such a holy land was very important to the ancestors after all, and it was also an incomparably precious opportunity for ordinary domain ancestors like them, if they could enter the third holy land and grab some resources, they might be able to rise.

For example, those Invincible Domain Ancestors, who had been stranded at the Invincible Domain Ancestor level for countless years, if they were able to enter the third holy land, maybe there would be supreme treasures to forcibly help them break the shackles and be promoted to Invincible Domain Ancestors.

As for the control of the physical body, it is completely possible to jump over, and after becoming a superior domain ancestor, it is also possible to slowly control the physical body.

Besides, many Invincible Domain Ancestors didn't care about the foundation or anything, if they could become a Superior Domain Ancestor, they would be satisfied.

In short, once the third Dark Sanctuary is born, the endless domain ancestors of the entire Dark Sanctuary will want to compete for opportunities.

this day.

The Battle Gate opened a meeting, which was initiated by the two ancestors of the Battle Gate, and no superior domain ancestor had to participate in it.

So, Ye Tian rushed to the Battle Ancestor Realm as soon as possible.

Zhan Zu Realm, in the Zhan Zu Palace.

A Superior Domain Ancestor appeared, and Ye Tian also entered here.

Here, he saw some familiar figures, all of them were the Superior Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate, as well as some half-step Ancestors.

"Fifty-eight Peerless Domain Ancestors, thirteen Half-Step Ancestors, is this the true strength of the Battle Gate?"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

This is more than the last time I invaded the Silent Annihilation Clan, and it can be seen that I didn't participate in it last time.

After all, any Holy Gate also needs to maintain its strength, and it is impossible to come out of the nest.

Moreover, Ye Tian was sure that the Peerless Domain Ancestors here were not all of them, and there might be some Peerless Domain Ancestors roaming in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and even some Peerless Domain Ancestors were hidden.

Therefore, the Peerless Domain Ancestor and the Half-Step Ancestor of the Battle Gate together were definitely above a hundred.

One Holy Gate has more than a hundred Peerless Domain Ancestors, the Ten Sacred Gates of the Dark Sacred Domain, and the number of powerhouses above the Peerless Domain Ancestor is more than a thousand, plus some Holy Lands, idle organizations, and scattered cultivators of the Superior Domain Ancestors.

It can be said that the powerhouses above the Superior Domain Ancestor in the Dark Sacred Domain are at least more than two thousand, or even more.

And there are many more Peerless Domain Ancestors in the Dark Destruction Domain than in the Dark Sacred Domain, after all, it is the first Dark Sacred Land, which was born in an even longer period of time, so there are at least three or four thousand Peerless Domain Ancestors.

Coupled with the Superior Domain Ancestors of the Dark Forbidden Domain, they were scattered together.

The Peerless Domain Ancestors of the entire Dark Forbidden Domain were at least 10,000 or more.

And last time, all the major forces took action, and only mobilized more than 3,000 unsurpassed domain ancestors.

"The last time I invaded the Silent Annihilation Clan, all the major forces hid their forces, what a shame!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If the third Dark Holy Land was born this time, the number of Peerless Domain Ancestors in the entire Dark Forbidden Domain would probably increase a lot.

Soon, the meeting began.

It was the Realm Ancestor who spoke, after all, the Realm Ancestor was the strongest.

"This summons you here to discuss the birth of the Third Dark Sanctuary. The Realm Ancestor said solemnly: "The birth of the Third Dark Holy Land will give birth to many worlds, of course, it is estimated that the Ancestral Realm will not be born at the beginning, and the scope will not be too large. And due to the problem of rules, at the beginning, the Ancestor was not allowed to enter the Holy Land, and even the Ancestor of the Superior Domain could not enter it. According to the usual practice, for the first 100 million years, only half-step domain ancestors were allowed to enter. After 100 million years, within a trillion years, only the Supreme Domain Ancestor is allowed to enter it. Within a realm year, only the Superior Domain Ancestors were allowed to enter it, and if the Ancestors wanted to enter the third Dark Holy Land, they would need a hundred realm years. If within a hundred realms, the third Dark Holy Land cannot give birth to an Ancestor, we will successfully invade and occupy the third Dark Holy Land. If an Ancestor is born, then we will not be able to invade, we will only be able to snatch some resources. Just like the original Dark Holy Land, if it weren't for the Hundred Realms and the Holy Ancestor becoming the Ancestor, our Dark Holy Land would have fallen into a part of the Dark Destruction Domain. "

"Realm Ancestor, why can a single Ancestor be born to protect the Dark Holy Land?The Dark Destruction Domain and the Dark Holy Land have many Ancestors, and the strength of the Saint Ancestor and the Destruction Ancestor is enough to kill ordinary Ancestors in an instant!"

A peerless domain ancestor asked curiously.

The other Peerless Domain Ancestors also looked at the Realm Ancestors, and they didn't know much about this secret, so they were also very curious.

"Because the first ancestor born from a dark holy land will become the lord of the holy land, and can mobilize the power of the dark holy land and exert the combat power of the strongest ancestor. Of course, once you leave the Dark Holy Land, your strength will immediately return to its original form. Whether it is the Holy Ancestor or the Destruction Ancestor, although the strength is very close to the strongest Ancestor, it is still not the strongest Ancestor, so it is impossible to kill a Lord of the Holy Land in the Dark Holy Land!"

Jiezu explained.

"I see!"

Many of the ancestors of the Superior Domain have come to their senses.

Now.

Ye Tian was very excited in his heart.

The third Dark Holy Land was born, and other Superior Domain Ancestors couldn't enter, and neither could the Ancestors.

But he was able to get in!

Once he copied the body of a half-step domain ancestor, he could enter the third Dark Holy Land, and who would be able to compete with him at that time?

When the time comes, isn't the biggest benefit there still his?

Moreover, he could also quickly improve his cultivation in that third Dark Holy Land, and even had the hope of becoming an Ancestor in the Third Dark Holy Land.

If he didn't care about the foundation, he would really be able to quickly cultivate to the level of a non-superior domain ancestor, and then rely on that space ancestor method to become an ancestor.

The Spatial Ancestor Method is an Ancestral Law that he obtained, and it is very complete, and the Ancestor who created this Spatial Ancestor Method has fallen, so he can completely become an Ancestor with the help of that Ancestral Method.

However, his ontology does not look down on the Spatial Ancestor Method, and it is the Ancestor Law of his predecessors, relying on such an Ancestor Method to become an Ancestor, it is difficult to become a strong person like the Holy Ancestor in the future.

However, it is only a copy of the body, and it does not affect the body.

Moreover, if the copy body becomes the ancestor, it will still be good for his body, at least he knows the mystery of the ancestor, and provides him with some insights for him to become the ancestor from the founding ancestor method in the future.

It can be said that the birth of the third dark holy land is simply a great opportunity tailored for him, and even a great opportunity for the rise of the human race.
